title: lobelia hintoniorum
intro: Lobelia hintoniorum, also known as Hinton's lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is a perennial plant native to Mexico, traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and respiratory infections due to its ability to ease coughs and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Lobelia hintoniorum is often used in the form of tinctures, teas, or infusions, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
